message: fix: skip Anubis pages in Nitter fallback

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@
 - Streaming: lock live render width and tighten tail rows to reduce duplicate lines while scrolling.
 - Streaming: re-render full summary on completion so tail mode doesn’t truncate output.
 - Streaming: append when frames are prefix-only so scrollback grows during stable streaming.
+- Twitter/X: rotate Nitter hosts and skip Anubis PoW pages during tweet fallback.
 
 ### Changed

 import { extractReadabilityFromHtml } from './readability.js'

+  isBlockedTwitterContent,

+  toNitterUrls,
+} from './twitter-utils.js'
 import type { ExtractedLinkContent, FetchLinkContentOptions, MarkdownMode } from './types.js'
 import {
   appendNote,
@@ -291,6 +296,11 @@ export async function fetchLinkContent(
           deps.onProgress?.({ kind: 'nitter-done', url: nitterUrl, ok: false, textBytes: null })
           continue
         }

+          continue
